title: GxP Plugin Configuration Form
description: Defines the configuration form shown to admins in the GxP admin panel when they install or configure a plugin. Follows the GxP templating system (ShowPage > tabs > cards > fields). Two root sections exist: `settings` (cards appended to the page's main settings tab) and `additionalTabs` (complete tabs of their own).

settings.description: Cards rendered on the page's main settings tab.

additionalTabs.description: Top-level tab definitions. Each item is either a tab object ({title, icon, cards}) or a card (card_list/fields_list) rendered under the plugin's configuration panel.

formTemplate.description: Starter form/quiz/survey question set for plugins that act as a form app. Each item is a card defining a form section (use `fields_list` for question groups or `card_list` to nest further). The admin can copy/customize these when they install the plugin. Only meaningful when `formTemplate` is true in app-manifest.json.

tabDefinition.description: A complete tab: title plus the cards it renders. Distinguished from a card by the absence of `type`.
